reason: Cost is a form of price, and it directly corresponds to the price attribute.
Currency is directly related to the price and should be mapped to priceCurrency.
Details often include additional information about the product which can be considered part of the description.
Manufacturer is usually the brand of the product.
The product name typically includes a description of the product.
The source attribute 'amount' represents the price of the product, which aligns with the mediated schema attribute 'price'.
The source attribute 'brand_name' indicates the brand of the product, which aligns with the mediated schema attribute 'brand'.
The source attribute 'currency_code' indicates the currency of the price, matching the mediated schema attribute 'priceCurrency'.
The source attribute 'description_text' provides a detailed description of the product, which can be mapped to the mediated schema attribute 'description'.
The source attribute 'name' closely matches the mediated schema attribute 'title'.
